case_title: DRUMMER, DENISE VS BUDGET RENT A CAR SYSTEMS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO C.T. CORPORATION AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS SEARS, ROEBUCK AND BUDGET RETURNED SIGNED
